headline: GE HealthCare announces cash dividend for second quarter of 2026
summary: CHICAGO, June 30, 2026--The Board of Directors of GE HealthCare Technologies Inc. (Nasdaq: GEHC) today declared a cash dividend of $0.035 per share of Common Stock for the second quarter of 2026 payable on August 14, 2026, to all shareholders of record as of July 24, 2026.

headline: GEHC Launches Allia Upgrade Pathways for Interventional Suites
summary: GE HealthCare's Allia upgrade pathways let providers modernize legacy imaging systems with AI-enabled workflows while reducing construction and disruption.
